mapper.select: SELECT apply_id,apply_user_id,receive_user_id,apply_message,status,create_time,deal_time FROM user_contact_apply WHERE apply_user_id = #{applyUserId} AND receive_user_id = #{receiveUserId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_contact_apply WHERE receive_user_id = #{receiveUserId} AND status = 0
